properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thank You for Your mercy Thank You for Your grace Thank You for Your Blood That's made a way To come into Your presence And glorify Your Name Lord, I stand amazed at what I see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Great is Your mercy toward me Your loving kindness toward me Your tender mercies I see Day after day Forever faithful to me Always providing for me Great is Your mercy toward me Great is Your grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your promises are ageless Your Love will never end To a thousand generations Your covenant will stand Showing grace and mercy To those who fear Your name Establishing Your righteousness and praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Great is Your mercy toward me Great is Your grace Great is Your mercy toward me Great is Your grace
